title: orchis incarnata var. elatior
intro: Orchis incarnata var. elatior, also known as the Western twayblade, is a type of orchid plant species that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchis incarnata var. elatior include its potential to treat various conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant often take the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to create remedies for a range of health issues.
